stub: She is a Labour MP who comes from a white working class background.
personalization: She tends to vote in accordance with the instructions of her party, even when that conflicts with the wishes of her constituents.
substantive: She supports adopting more stringent measures to limit immigration.
justification: In political debates, she regularly explains how her policies matter to people like you (e.g. of your class and educational background).
responsiveness: Asked recently about the role and duties of politicians, she said: “I went into politics to implement good ideas, not popular ones that win elections.”
text: She is a Labour MP who comes from a white working class background. She is from your constituency. She tends to vote in accordance with the instructions of her party, even when that conflicts with the wishes of her constituents. She supports adopting more stringent measures to limit immigration. In political debates, she regularly explains how her policies matter to people like you (e.g. of your class and educational background). Asked recently about the role and duties of politicians, she said: “I went into politics to implement good ideas, not popular ones that win elections.”
